title: 安田記念の後に・悔しさを胸に！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oguri won the Yasuda Kinen! I'm super bummed,
but I trained so hard to beat her that it turned
into a real fiery showdown!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And it looks like Yaeno gets it now! If Oguri
wasn't such an awesome racer, none of us would
be working so hard for our dreams! None of us
would burn bright!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno said my mindset reminded her of how she
felt when she faced formidable opponents in the
past. She says she's ready to run toward her
dream once more!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I also realized something from today's race. Oguri may be my ultimate rival, but I also want to be her ultimate rival.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
To do that, I'm running in the Takarazuka Kinen
next! Yaeno and Chiyono O are gonna be there
too, so I can't wait for our dreams to clash!
